info.title: Grubhub API
info.description: The Grubhub API enables restaurant partners and integrators to manage orders, menus, and restaurant operations on the Grubhub food ordering and delivery platform.

get.description: Retrieve a list of restaurants associated with the authenticated account.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of restaurants to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of restaurants to skip for pagination.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific restaurant.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

put.description: Update details for a specific restaurant.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve the current availability and operating hours for a restaurant.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

put.description: Update the availability and operating hours for a restaurant.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve all menus for a specific restaurant.

200.description: A list of menus for the restaurant.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

put.description: Update the full menu structure for a restaurant.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve all items in a specific menu.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

put.description: Update a specific item within a menu.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the menu item.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

404.description: Restaurant, menu, or item not found.

put.description: Update the availability status of a specific menu item (e.g., mark as sold out or available).

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the menu item.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

404.description: Restaurant, menu, or item not found.

get.description: Retrieve a list of orders for a specific restaurant.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter orders placed on or after this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter orders placed on or before this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of orders to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of orders to skip for pagination.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific order.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

post.description: Confirm acceptance of an incoming order and provide an estimated prep time.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or order cannot be confirmed in its current state.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

post.description: Reject an incoming order with a reason.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or order cannot be rejected in its current state.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

post.description: Cancel a previously confirmed order with a reason.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or order cannot be cancelled in its current state.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

put.description: Update the estimated preparation time for an active order.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve the current delivery status for an order.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific delivery.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

post.description: Update the status of a delivery (e.g., picked up, en route, delivered).

400.description: Invalid request parameters or invalid status transition.

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve order report data for a restaurant over a specified date range.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for the report period (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for the report period (ISO 8601 format).

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve financial report data for a restaurant over a specified date range.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for the report period (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for the report period (ISO 8601 format).

401.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Obtain a token via the Grubhub OAuth 2.0 authorization flow.

field.description: The field that caused the error.

reason.description: Description of why the field is invalid.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the restaurant was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the restaurant was last updated.

isClosed.description: Whether the restaurant is closed on this day.

isOpen.description: Whether the restaurant is currently accepting orders.

acceptingOrders.description: Whether the restaurant is actively accepting new orders.

pausedUntil.description: If paused, the time when the restaurant will resume accepting orders.

reason.description: Reason for the current availability status.

acceptingOrders.description: Whether the restaurant should accept new orders.

pausedUntil.description: Pause order acceptance until this time.

name.description: Name of the menu (e.g., Lunch, Dinner, Catering).

isActive.description: Whether the menu is currently active.

availableHours.description: Hours during which this menu is available.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the menu was last updated.

itemId.description: Unique identifier of the menu item.

price.description: Base price of the item in USD.

isAvailable.description: Whether the item is currently available for ordering.

allergens.description: List of allergens present in the item.

price.description: Base price of the item in USD.

isAvailable.description: Whether the item is currently available for ordering.

allergens.description: List of allergens present in the item.

groupId.description: Unique identifier of the modifier group.

name.description: Name of the modifier group (e.g., Size, Toppings).

isDefault.description: Whether this modifier is selected by default.

menus.description: Complete list of menus to set for the restaurant.

itemId.description: Unique identifier of the menu item.

isAvailable.description: Whether the item is currently available.

unavailableUntil.description: If unavailable, when the item will become available again.

isAvailable.description: Whether the item should be marked as available.

unavailableUntil.description: If marking unavailable, when the item will become available again.

subtotal.description: Order subtotal before fees and taxes.

placedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

confirmedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was confirmed.

deliveredAt.description: Timestamp when the order was delivered.

itemId.description: Unique identifier of the menu item.

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line item.

totalCount.description: Total number of orders matching the query.

estimatedPrepTime.description: Updated estimated preparation time in minutes.

driverLocation.description: Current location of the delivery driver.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last status update.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the associated order.

driverPhone.description: Phone number of the delivery driver.

estimatedPickupTime.description: Estimated pickup time from the restaurant.

estimatedDeliveryTime.description: Estimated delivery time to the customer.

actualPickupTime.description: Actual pickup time from the restaurant.

actualDeliveryTime.description: Actual delivery time to the customer.

driverLocation.description: Current location of the delivery driver.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the delivery was created.

message.description: Optional message about the status update.

startDate.description: Start date of the report period.

endDate.description: End date of the report period.

totalOrders.description: Total number of orders in the period.

startDate.description: Start date of the report period.

endDate.description: End date of the report period.

netRevenue.description: Net revenue after fees and commissions.

commissionFees.description: Total commission fees charged by Grubhub.

totalPayout.description: Total payout amount to the restaurant.

tags.name: Menus
tags.description: Manage restaurant menus and menu items
